job_description:
# Remote - Sr. Data Analyst - Clinical
Company: Alignment Health
Source: Official company posting via Workday
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://alignmenthealthcare.wd12.myworkdayjobs.com/en-US/ahc_external/job/Sr-Data-Analyst---Clinical_R1653

## Highlights
- Fully remote senior clinical data analyst role.
- Posted 12 days ago.
- Emphasizes operational reporting, dashboards, performance metrics, clinical and claims data analysis, SQL, validation, documentation, and root-cause support.
- Strong healthcare analytics overlap, though the role leans more toward clinical operations and utilization reporting than strict ETL QA.
strengths: Excellent match on healthcare domain, SQL, reporting, and data accuracy work.
Resume supports claims, provider, eligibility, dashboard, and cross-functional analytics.
Remote official posting within the last 60 days.
gaps: Clinical operations framing is stronger than the current resume's payer ETL framing.
Role may expect deeper cost/utilization analytics than the resume foregrounds.
notes: Good official-board miss. Tailor toward healthcare analytics, claims/member/provider data, SQL, validation, dashboards, and data accuracy. Keep the framing on analysis and reporting rather than overstating clinical program ownership.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Senior Healthcare Data Analyst | SQL | Clinical & Claims Reporting | Data Quality

replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.
replacements.replace: Senior Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted healthcare data for reporting and operational decision-making. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Strong fit for clinical and claims reporting roles that require data accuracy, analytical rigor, and cross-functional partnership.

replacements.find: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query)
replacements.replace: Power BI, Tableau, Excel (advanced – pivots, lookups, Power Query), dashboard and metric reporting

validation_notes: official_site_checked is missing or false; official career site was not verified; detail page loaded and posting date is within 60 days
